message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "Sales Clerk" as clerk
rectangle "Presentation" as presentation {
  rectangle "OrderDeliveredUI" as ui
}
rectangle "Application" as application {
  rectangle "OrderDeliveredController" as controller
}
rectangle "Service" as service {
  rectangle "OrderDeliveredService" as service_impl
}
rectangle "Persistence" as persistence {
  rectangle "PersistenceContext" as persistence_context
}
rectangle "Factory" as factory {
  rectangle "RepositoryFactory" as factory_impl
}
rectangle "Repository" as repository {
  cylinder "orderRepository : Repository" as repo
}
rectangle "Domain" as domain {
  rectangle "orderList : List<Order>" as order_list
}
rectangle "DTO" as dto {
  rectangle "orderDTOList : List<OrderDTO>" as order_dto_list
}
rectangle "DTO" as dto2 {
  rectangle "orderDTO : OrderDTO" as order_dto
}
rectangle "DTO" as dto3 {
  rectangle "selectedOrderDTOList : List<OrderDTO>" as selected_order_dto_list
}
rectangle "Domain" as domain2 {
  rectangle "order : Order" as order_domain
}

note right of clerk
  The Sales Clerk initializes
  the process of updating the status of the order
end note

activate ui
activate controller
activate service_impl
activate persistence_context
activate factory_impl
activate repo
activate order_list
activate order_dto_list
activate order_dto
activate selected_order_dto_list
activate order_domain

ui -> controller : create
controller -> service_impl : create
service_impl -> persistence_context : repositories()
persistence_context -> factory_impl : factory
factory_impl -> repo : create
persistence_context -> factory_impl : orderRepository()
factory_impl -> repo : create
persistence_context -> order_list : create

service_impl -> controller : listAllDispatchedOrders()
controller -> service_impl : listAllDispatchedOrders()
service_impl -> order_list : getAllDispatchedOrders()
order_list -> order_dto_list : create

loop (foreach)
  order_list -> order_dto : getNext()
  order_dto -> order_dto : create
  order_dto -> order_domain : toDTO(order)
  order_domain -> order_dto : create
  order_dto -> order_dto_list : add(orderDTO)
end

order_dto_list -> controller : orderDTOList
controller -> ui : orderDTOList

note right of clerk
  The System presents a list of Orders to the
  Sales Clerk whose Status are "Preparation"
  and asks the Sales Clerk to choose Orders
  whose Status will be updated to "Delivered".
end note

note right of clerk
  The Sales Clerk selects the Orders whose
  Status are to be updated:
end note

activate ui
activate controller
activate service_impl
activate persistence_context
activate factory_impl
activate repo
activate order_list
activate order_dto_list
activate order_dto
activate selected_order_dto_list
activate order_domain

ui -> controller : updateStatus(selectedOrderDTOList)
controller -> service_impl : updateStatusAndPersist(selectedOrderDTOList)
service_impl -> order_dto_list : getNext()
order_dto_list -> order_dto : getNext()
order_dto -> order_domain : toOrder(orderDTO)
order_domain -> order_dto : create
order_dto -> order_domain : changeStatusToDelivered()
order_domain -> order_dto : create
order_dto -> repo : update(order)

repo -> order_dto : create

note right of clerk
  The System updates the Status of the selected Orders
  and informs the Sales Clerk of the operation success.
end note

deactivate ui
deactivate controller
deactivate service_impl
deactivate persistence_context
deactivate factory_impl
deactivate repo
deactivate order_list
deactivate order_dto_list
deactivate order_dto
deactivate selected_order_dto_list
deactivate order_domain

@enduml
